rationale: Best balance of child-friendly storybook style and dress-up usability among the generated candidates.
Short bob hair stays clear of the torso and waist, reducing top and necklace layer conflicts.
Arms are separated from the torso enough for outfit overlays.
Round neckline leaves room for necklace validation.
Feet are visible and separated enough to test left/right shoe placement.
risks: The base dress hem covers the upper legs, so bottoms may need to fully cover or replace the skirt region.
Hands are close to the skirt area and may need to stay visually behind wide tops or dresses.
The initial anchors are manual estimates and must be adjusted after the first item composites.
